ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF TBF FINANCIAL, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF TBF FINANCIAL, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THE DECLARATION OF ADAM BOEHM ARE SUSTAINED AND THUS PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION. EVEN IF ALL OF THE BOEHM DECLARATION IS CONSIDERED, THE PURPORTED ASSIGNMENT CONTAINS NO MENTION OF THE FINANCING AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF'S UNTIMELY ATTEMPT TO CORRECT THIS OMISSION FAILS BECAUSE THE NEWLY ADDED DOCUMENT REFERS TO THE FINANCING AGREEMENT AS FILE # 907-0000938-000, A NUMBER THAT APPEARS NOWHERE ON THE FINANCING AGREEMENT. THE FINANCING AGREEMENT REPEATEDLY REFERS TO ITSELF AS AGREEMENT #606838. FINALLY, EVEN IF PLAINTIFF DID MEET ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION, DEFENDANT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHEN PAYMENTS ON THE FINANCING AGREEMENT STOPPED AND WHETHER THE DEFENDANT'S EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR WAS AUTHORIZED TO MAKE THE PURCHASE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; COURT REPORTER: TEANNA L. WARD, CSR NO. 119118

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF TBF FINANCIAL, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 1, 2013 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF TBF FINANCIAL, LLC'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. AT THE REQUEST OF THE PARTIES, THE COURT CONTINUED THE HEARING DATE ON THIS MOTION--ORIGINALLY SET FOR JUNE 18, 2013--TO SEPTEMBER 25, 2013. THE HEARING WAS CONTINUED AGAIN ON SEPTEMBER 25, 2013 TO OCTOBER 1, 2013, PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. RATHER THAN SIMPLY CONTINUING THE HEARING DATE PER THE FIRST REQUEST MADE BY THE PARTIES, PLAINTIFF FILED AN AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION, AMENDED MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, AMENDED AND SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATIONS, AND AN AMENDED SEPARATE STATEMENT ON JUNE 14, 2013. THE AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION, FILED JUNE 14, 2013, STATES THAT THE MOTION RELIES ON "THIS NOTICE, ALL OF THE PLEADINGS, RECORDS AND PAPERS PREVIOUSLY SERVED FILED HEREIN, THE SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION, THE AMENDED POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AND AMENDED SEPARATE STATEMENT ATTACHED HERETO." FURTHER, THE DECLARATION OF LORNA WALKER IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 1008 WAS NOT FILED UNTIL JUNE 14, 2013-FOUR DAYS BEFORE THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE. IN EFFECT, PLAINTIFF HAS FILED A THIRD MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, AND WITHOUT MAKING CLEAR TO THE COURT THE SPECIFIC PLEADINGS, RECORDS AND PAPERS UPON WHICH THE CURRENT MOTION RELIES. THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE WHAT PAPERS, IF ANY, ARE SUPERSEDED BY THE "AMENDED MOTION" FILED ON JUNE 14, 2013. THE MOTION IS THUS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. FURTHER, THE COURT NOTES THAT DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED SEPARATE STATEMENT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH RULE OF COURT 3.1350(F), WHICH REQUIRES THAT "EACH MATERIAL FACT CLAIMED BY THE MOVING PARTY TO BE UNDISPUTED MUST SET OUT VERBATIM ON THE LEFT SIDE OF THE PAGE, BELOW WHICH MUST BE SET OUT THE EVIDENCE SAID BY THE MOVING PARTY TO ESTABLISH THAT FACT, COMPLETE WITH THE MOVING PARTY'S REFERENCES TO EXHIBITS." (EMPHASIS ADDED) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER,
LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF TBF FINANCIAL, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. DUPLICATE ENTRY.

AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES - ATTY. LORNA WALKER OF THE LAW OFFICES OF SWEET & WALKER, P.C., TEL. NO. 334-1600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. THOMAS CROWELL, TEL. NO. 702-7243 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
ATTY. JAMES V. SANSONE, TEL. NO. (707) 542-5611 APPEARING FOR THE CROSS-DEFENDANT DANIEL BROIN BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TBF FINANCIAL, LLC'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off calendar. At the request of the parties, the Court continued the hearing date on this motion--originally set for June 18, 2013--to September 25, 2013. The hearing was continued again on September 25, 2013 to October 1, 2013, per agreement of the parties. Rather than simply continuing the hearing date per the first request made by the parties, Plaintiff filed an amended notice of motion, amended memorandum of points and authorities, amended and supplemental declarations, and an amended separate statement on June 14, 2013. The amended notice of motion, filed June 14, 2013, states that the motion relies on "this notice, all of the pleadings, records and papers previously served filed herein, the supplemental declaration, the amended points and authorities and amended separate statement attached hereto." Further, the Declaration of Lorna Walker in Support of Motion for Summary Judgment Pursuant to CCP 1008 was not filed until June 14, 2013-four days before the original hearing date. In effect, Plaintiff has filed a third motion for summary judgment, and without making clear to the Court the specific pleadings, records and papers upon which the current motion relies. The Court cannot determine what papers, if any, are superseded by the "amended motion" filed on June 14, 2013. The motion is thus taken off calendar. Further, the Court notes that Defendant's Response to Plaintiff's Amended Separate Statement fails to comply with Rule of Court 3.1350(f), which requires that "each material fact claimed by the moving party to be undisputed must set out verbatim on the left side of the page, below which must be set out the evidence said by the moving party to establish that fact, complete with the moving party's references to exhibits." (emphasis added) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. THOMAS M. CROWELL OF TOSCHI, SIDRAN, COLLINS & DOYLE,
TEL. NO. (510) 835-3400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT IMMUNE ENHANCEMENT PROJECT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TBF FINANCIAL, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Denied. Defendant's objections to the declaration of Adam Boehm are sustained and thus Plaintiff has failed to meet its burden of production. Even if all of the Boehm declaration is considered, the purported assignment contains no mention of the Financing Agreement. Plaintiff's untimely attempt to correct this omission fails because the newly added document refers to the Financing Agreement as File # 907-0000938-000, a number that appears nowhere on the Financing Agreement. The Financing Agreement repeatedly refers to itself as Agreement #606838. Finally, even if Plaintiff did meet its burden of production, Defendant raised a triable issue of material fact as to when payments on the Financing Agreement stopped and whether the Defendant's executive director was authorized to make the purchase. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 =302/JM
